requirements.description: GIVEN admin_write_repo WHEN enforce_administration_write_gate(repo, "refs/heads/main") is called with BUT_AGENT_HANDLE=dev, then with BUT_AGENT_HANDLE=admin, then with BUT_AGENT_HANDLE=dev after writing administration:write for dev into the working-tree permissions.toml THEN dev is denied with perm.denied naming administration:write, admin is permitted with Ok(()), and the working-tree self-grant is still denied because the guard reads the committed target-ref blob. A no-op always-Ok guard fails the dev-denied half.

GIVEN the source tree WHEN the build-gate greps run over config_mutate.rs THEN the admin-write decision keys off the fully-qualified but_authz::authorize / Authority::AdministrationWrite path, no role-name or human-vs-AI label appears, and GitButler Permission or RepoExclusive locking is not used as the authorization carrier.

GIVEN admin_write_malformed WHEN enforce_administration_write_gate is called with BUT_AGENT_HANDLE=admin THEN the malformed committed permissions.toml fails closed as config.invalid, never Ok, never perm.denied, and never skipped.

enforce_administration_write_gate denies dev with perm.denied naming administration:write, permits admin with Ok(()), and still denies a working-tree administration:write self-grant for dev because authority comes from the committed target-ref blob.
config-mutate guard keys off the fully-qualified but_authz::authorize / Authority::AdministrationWrite structural authority path, with no role-name, human-vs-AI branch, or Permission-lock overload.
malformed target-ref permissions.toml returns config.invalid and is not blurred into perm.denied or skipped.
